name: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio
steps:
1. Cook spaghetti until al dente.
2. Sauté sliced garlic in olive oil until golden.
3. Add chili flakes, then toss in drained pasta.
4. Garnish with parsley and serve.

name: Veggie Omelette
steps:
1. Beat eggs with salt.
2. Sauté onion, tomato, and bell pepper in butter.
3. Pour eggs over veggies and cook until set.
4. Fold and serve hot.

name: Chicken Stir Fry
steps:
1. Marinate chicken in soy sauce and ginger.
2. Stir fry garlic and onion in hot oil.
3. Add chicken and cook through.
4. Toss in bell pepper and serve.

name: Tomato Soup
steps:
1. Sauté onion and garlic in butter.
2. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until soft.
3. Blend smooth, season with salt and pepper.
4. Stir in cream and serve warm.

name: Egg Fried Rice
steps:
1. Cook and cool rice beforehand.
2. Scramble eggs in oil, set aside.
3. Fry garlic and onion, add rice and soy sauce.
4. Mix in eggs and serve hot.

name: Avocado Toast
steps:
1. Toast bread slices.
2. Mash avocado with lemon juice and salt.
3. Spread on toast.
4. Top with chili flakes and a drizzle of olive oil.

name: Grilled Chicken Salad
steps:
1. Season and grill chicken until cooked.
2. Slice and place over lettuce, tomato, cucumber.
3. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.
4. Season and serve.

name: Banana Pancakes
steps:
1. Mash banana and mix with eggs, flour, and milk.
2. Add a pinch of salt.
3. Cook spoonfuls on a buttered pan until golden.
4. Serve with honey or syrup.

name: Tuna Pasta
steps:
1. Cook pasta until al dente.
2. Sauté garlic in olive oil, add tomatoes.
3. Stir in drained tuna and season.
4. Toss with pasta and garnish with parsley.

name: Lentil Soup
steps:
1. Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil.
2. Add lentils, tomato, cumin, and water.
3. Simmer 25 minutes until lentils are soft.
4. Season and serve with bread.

name: Beef Tacos
steps:
1. Brown ground beef with onion and cumin.
2. Season with salt.
3. Fill taco shells with beef mixture.
4. Top with tomato, lettuce, and cheese.

name: Caprese Salad
steps:
1. Slice tomatoes and mozzarella.
2. Alternate slices on a plate.
3. Tuck basil leaves between slices.
4. Drizzle with olive oil, season and serve.
